name: Humanica Public Company Limited
summary: Humanica Public Company Limited provides various human resource services and solutions in Thailand, Singapore, Japan, and Malaysia. It operates through Human Resources Solutions and Financial Solutions segments. The company offers Humatrix, a human resource and payroll management solution for mid to large corporations, including manufacturing, hospitality, healthcare, restaurants, and retail. It also offers human resource outsourcing and payroll services; enterprise resource planning and implementation services; payroll outsourcing services; P2P lending platform; and business consulting services to business optimization, business transformation, and business expansion. In addition, the company provides design, develops content, and creating educational solutions, including sale of mobile based learning management solutions; business application of systems management, human resource, and payroll programs; and distributes technologies, including record time such as time recording machines, ace scanners, fingerprint scanners, and hand card machines, etc. Further, it engages in the development and sale of human resource solutions software, as well as provides property management services. The company provides accounting and financial services, which consists of managing accounting information, financial planning advisory, accounting, financial management, and tax services. It also offers brokerage services to provide cutting-edge platforms for employee welfare management, such as healthcare and wellness, as well as operates as a comprehensive community for employees. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
